GM:(0,0,0)  M:(1,1,1)  N:(-1/2,1,-1/2)  NA:(-1,-1/2,-1/2)  P:(-1/2,1/2,-1/2)  PA:(-1/2,-1/2,-1/2)  X:(-1/2,1/2,-1)  XA:(-1/2,-1/2,-1)
GM:(0,0,0)  Y:(0,1,0)  L:(1/2,1/2,1/2)  V:(1/2,1/2,0)  U:(0,1/2,1/2)  U:(0,3/2,1/2)  M:(0,1,1/2)  A:(0,0,1/2)
GM1  GM2GM2  GM3GM4  (M)Y1  (M)Y2Y2  (M)Y3Y4  (N)L1  (N)L2  (NA)V1  (NA)V2  (P)U1  (P)U2  (P)U3  (P)U4  (PA)UA1  (PA)UA2  (PA)UA3  (PA)UA4  (X)M1  (X)M2  (X)M3  (X)M4  (XA)A1  (XA)A2  (XA)A3  (XA)A4
